name: Raisin and Bran Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 0:15
Preheat oven to 375°F. Prepare baking sheet with cooking spray and flour.
In a mixing bowl, combine margarine, egg whites, and vanilla. In another
mixing bowl, combine flour, bran, sugar, baking soda, raisins, cinnamon,
nutmeg, and salt. Mix wet ingredients with dry ingredients just until
mixed. Drop dough by heaping teaspoons onto prepared baking sheet.
Bake for 14 to 16 minutes or firm to the touch.
